name_cn:
『YSL Saint Laurent』
Classic Mail Bag, a hot 24cm style, street style essential, a top choice for many Hollywood stars. Looks good with any outfit, no matter the style. Casual wear looks effortless and cool, while formal wear exudes elegance and luxury. A bag for any occasion!! This year's must-have bag is you! 392737 Model: 26611 Size: 24x17x6cm
